title: Notes
text: 3D is perhaps the most powerful framework any algorithms, models, or systems can employ. In some sense, the idea of it is general enough to make connections with many important subjects and fields, but also the world we live, breathe, sense, and experience in is also three-dimension—something fundamental that even the SOTA model in different areas still lack (e.g., autoregressive-transformer LLMs) or struggle (e.g., inverse rendering).
